title: Arise, O Lord, our God, arise
We dedicate this temple
On the good and faithful
God of the prophets! Bless the prophets' sons
Eternal Father, strong to save
Almighty Father, strong to save
O God, beneath Thy guiding hand
We plow the fields and scatter
Come, ye thankful people, come
Ring out the old, ring in the new
Great God, we sing that mighty hand
Let all who enter here
Come, my soul, thy suit prepare
Now God be with us, for the night is closing
Father, the watches of the night are o'er
Come dearest Lord, descend and dwell
O Thou who hearest every heartfelt prayer
Lord, for the mercies of the night
Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart
Hear our prayer, O Lord
To my humble supplication
Create in me a clean heart, O God
Father, fill us with Thy love
Lead me Lord, lead me in Thy righteousness
Saviour, breathe an evening blessing
The lone, wild fowl in lofty flight
Day by day, Dear Lord, of Thee three things I pray
Almighty Father, hear our prayer
Part in peace: Christ's life was peace
Praise God from whom all blessings flow
Glory be to the Father
Let Thy Word abide in us, O Lord
O Lord, open Thou our eyes
Father of mercies, in Thy Word
At even, when the sun was set
Write these words in our hearts
The sacrifices of God are a broken spirit
We give Thee but Thine own
Bless Thou the gifts our hands have brought
O dearest Lord
All things are Thine; no gift have we
All things come of Thee, O Lord
Father, give Thy benediction
Amen
Sun of my soul, Thou Saviour dear
Amen, Amen
Amen, Amen, Amen
Amen, Amen, Amen, Amen, Amen, Amen, Amen
Lord, have mercy upon us, and incline our hearts to keep this law
Lord, have mercy, have mercy upon us
Before the day draws near its ending
Lord, have mercy upon un
Lord, have mercy upon us
Glory be to God on high
Lift up your hearts
Glory be to Thee, O Lord
Thanks be to Thee, O Christ
God, that madest earth and heaven
Praise be to Thee, O Christ
Holy, holy, holy, Lord God of Hosts
Holy, holy, Lord God of Hosts
O Lamb of God, that takest away the sins of the world
O come, let us sing unto the Lord
We praise Thee, O God; we acknowledge Thee to be the Lord
The day Thou gavest, Lord, is ended
Blessed be the Lord God of Israel
O be joyful in the Lord
O be joyful in the Lord, all ye lands
My soul doth magnify the Lord
Lord, now lettest Thou Thy servant depart in peace
The day thou gavest, Lord, is ended
Heaven and earth, and sea and air
Softly now the light of day
O gladsome light, O grace
Again, as evening's shadow falls
All praise to Thee, my God, this night
Abide with me: fast falls the eventide
Day is dying in the west
Now woods and wolds are sleeping
Now, on land and sea descending
When in the night I meditate
This is the day the Lord hath made
Of the Father's love begotten
O day of rest and gladness
The glorious gates of righteousness
This is the day of light
Light of light, enlighten me
Safely through another week
Praise our Father for this Sunday
May the grace of Christ our Saviour
Saviour, again to Thy dear name we raise
God be with you till we meet again
God be with you till we meet again
Lord, dismiss us with Thy blessing
Bless, O my soul! the living God
On our way rejoicing
Before Jehovah's awful throne
